output: AI stands for Artificial Intelligence.
Machine learning is a subset of AI where systems learn from data.
Deep learning uses neural networks with many layers.
NLP helps computers understand human language.
Python is a popular programming language.
Java is a widely used programming language.
C++ is a powerful programming language used in system software.
A chatbot is a program that simulates conversation.
Git is a version control system.
GitHub is a platform to host code repositories.
API allows communication between software systems.
A database stores structured information.
SQL is used to manage databases.
Cloud computing delivers services over the internet.
Data science extracts insights from data.
VS Code is a code editor.
Programming is writing instructions for computers.
An algorithm is a step-by-step solution to a problem.
A model is a system trained to make predictions.
Training is teaching a model using data.
Testing checks how well a model performs.
Overfitting happens when a model memorizes data.
Accuracy measures correct predictions.
A neural network mimics the human brain.
A prompt is input given to an AI model.
Chatbots are used for customer support and automation.
Automation means using machines to perform tasks.
Backend handles server-side logic.
Frontend is the user interface.
Full stack includes frontend and backend development.
